name: opl-foundation-skills
description: Source-only Codex plugin for OPL Framework base and support skills.

interface.shortDescription: AI-first support skills for OPL Framework operators and agent authors.
interface.longDescription: Provides source-only OPL support skills for Runway compute diagnosis, Stagecraft stage design, Connect source and skill routing, and Foundry Lab agent improvement review. These skills preserve AI-first judgment while keeping runtime, provider, receipt, owner, and readiness authority in OPL Framework and domain owner surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Foundation Skills to review a Runway compute handoff.
Use OPL Foundation Skills to design a Stagecraft stage prompt.
Use OPL Foundation Skills to route an external source or improve an agent skill.
